featureTitle: 质量门阶段适用性判定
sourceIntent: 收集质量门触发边界约束，生成可追溯设计文档，避免 AI 为通过门禁补写未授权文档。
assumptions: Keep follow-up discussion at product, workflow, or experience level unless the user asks for implementation design.
Expected outcome is inferred from the source intent and should be revisited if implementation needs a sharper success criterion.

constraints.description: Quality gate applies only to implementation, bugfix, or explicit archive readiness stages
constraints.rationale: Non-implementation stages must not be treated as failed implementation readiness
constraints.verificationMethod: Stage applicability tests cover implementation and non-implementation fixtures

acceptanceCriteria.description: Quality gate returns NotApplicable/SkippedByStage for non-implementation stages instead of inducing artifact creation.

goals: Prevent quality gate from inducing unrequested workflow artifact creation.
nonGoals: Making quality gate optional for implementation or bugfix work
problemStatement: Quality gate currently maps missing design/workspace/plan evidence to NotReady, which can induce AI to create unrequested workflow artifacts.
